summary: Improved fuzzy matching in src/melee/mn/mnmain.c by reshaping adjacent Vec3 constants into indexed arrays, hiding mn_80229A7C behind a typed static helper plus a small dontinline wrapper, and rewriting several menu construction/control-flow sections to use cleaner loops, locals, stack padding, and StaticModelDesc pointers. The public prototype for mn_80229A7C was removed from mnmain.h because the function became file-local. No PR body or review-comment evidence was present in the slice, so intent is inferred mainly from the title and diff.
what_changed: Converted separate adjacent Vec3 statics mn_803EB360/mn_803EB36C and mn_803EB378/mn_803EB384 into two-element Vec3 arrays mn_803EB360[2] and mn_803EB378[2]. Call sites were updated from pointer arithmetic like &mn_803EB360 + condition to indexed expressions such as &mn_803EB360[var_r26 == arg1].

Changed mn_80229A7C from an externally declared void*(arg0)-style function with #pragma dont_inline into a static typed helper taking struct mn_80229A7C_t*. Added static inline mn_80229A7C_dontinline(void*, int, int) to preserve a non-inlined call shape where needed.
Removed the mn_80229A7C prototype from src/melee/mn/mnmain.h after making the function static in mnmain.c.
Adjusted animation frame calculations to use the new Vec3 arrays, for example mn_803EB360[1].x versus mn_803EB360[0].x and mn_803EB378[1].x versus mn_803EB378[0].x.
Moved HSD_JObj* sp20[4] lower in fn_8022AFEC and added PAD_STACK(0x34), indicating a stack-layout-oriented fuzzy-match improvement.

Reworked mn_8022B3A0 locals and loops: enlarged local JObj arrays sp48 and sp2C, replaced while/do-while loops with for loops, introduced typed helper locals such as StaticModelDesc* top and Vec3* r31, simplified index variables, and added PAD_STACK(0x14).
In mn_8022B3A0, replaced repeated MenMainConTop_Top and MenMainCursor_Top field accesses with StaticModelDesc* top locals before HSD_JObjLoadJoint and HSD_JObjAddAnimAll calls.
In mn_8022B3A0, replaced an inline block that destroyed/recreated description HSD_Text with a direct call to mn_80229A7C(menu_data, menu_data->x0, menu_data->x1), reusing the helper.
Added PAD_STACK(8) in mn_8022D104, again suggesting stack-shape tuning for matching.
smart_moves: Grouping adjacent Vec3 globals into two-element arrays made boolean-index selection explicit and avoided awkward address arithmetic on separate symbols, which is both clearer and more likely to match the original data layout.
Keeping mn_80229A7C typed and static improved local type information while the mn_80229A7C_dontinline wrapper preserved the call/inlining behavior needed for matching a specific call site.
Removing the header declaration after making mn_80229A7C static avoided exporting an implementation detail and kept the header consistent with linkage.
Using StaticModelDesc* locals for MenMainConTop_Top and MenMainCursor_Top reduced repeated global field expressions and may influence register allocation in a controllable way.
Rewriting counter-heavy while loops into compact for loops reduced temporary variables and made menu index relationships, such as 2 * i, easier to see.
Replacing duplicated HSD_Text update code with mn_80229A7C centralized behavior and helped align the constructed function body with an existing helper's logic.
decomp_lessons: For fuzzy matches, check whether adjacent scalar/static objects are actually better represented as an array; boolean conditions often become clean array indices and improve both readability and codegen.

A function can be made static and strongly typed while still preserving no-inline behavior at selected call sites through a tiny wrapper; this is useful when header exposure and matching constraints conflict.
Stack local order and placement still matter for fuzzy matching. Moving an array declaration and adding PAD_STACK can be a deliberate match tactic rather than cosmetic cleanup.
When repeated global asset descriptors appear in generated code, introducing a pointer local to the StaticModelDesc can alter register use in useful ways while making the code clearer.
Prefer explicit indexed loops when they reveal original table indexing; replacing manual increment variables with for-loop indices can reduce fake temporaries in decomp output.
If a local helper already performs setup/teardown for a menu text object, call it directly rather than duplicating its body, unless the duplicate code is needed for an exact match.
naming_conventions: Unidentified main-menu symbols retain address-based names such as mn_803EB360, mn_803EB378, mn_803EB6B0, and mn_8022B3A0.
Static asset descriptors use resource-style names such as MenMainBack_Top, MenMainConTop_Top, and MenMainCursor_Top.
The temporary wrapper was named mn_80229A7C_dontinline, explicitly documenting its matching purpose rather than pretending it is a separate gameplay/menu concept.
The internal data struct for mn_80229A7C remained address-based as struct mn_80229A7C_t, matching the project convention for not-yet-semanticized structs.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Used Vec3 arrays and boolean indexing to replace pointer arithmetic over adjacent globals: mn_803EB360[var_r26 == arg1] and mn_803EB378[temp_p25 == i]-style patterns.
Replaced #pragma push / #pragma dont_inline on / #pragma pop around mn_80229A7C with a static inline wrapper that calls the typed static implementation.
Added PAD_STACK(0x34), PAD_STACK(0x14), and PAD_STACK(8) in affected functions to tune stack frame layout.
Moved local array declarations, including HSD_JObj* sp20[4], to influence stack order.
Adjusted local array sizes in mn_8022B3A0 from sp48[1]/sp2C[5] to sp48[12]/sp2C[7], matching observed use through lb_8001204C and later indexed access.
Introduced locals such as StaticModelDesc* top and Vec3* r31 to guide register allocation and avoid repeated global expressions.
Changed signed/unsigned local types around menu indices, including u8 temp_r25, u8 var_r16_2, and int temp_r22_2, likely to better match casts and register operations.
review_feedback: No review comments were included in the provided slice.
The slice reports one issue comment, but its body was not present, so no specific reviewer guidance can be extracted.
follow_up_queries: Find other mnmain.c fuzzy-match PRs that convert adjacent Vec3 statics into arrays.
Search for uses of *_dontinline wrappers replacing #pragma dont_inline in the melee codebase.
Check whether mn_803EB360 and mn_803EB378 later receive semantic names for selected/unselected menu cursor animation ranges.
Inspect future mn_8022B3A0 changes for whether the stack padding and StaticModelDesc pointer locals remained necessary.
